citation_alignment.text: Extracts citations from .tex and .bib files, resolves missing DOIs via the CrossRef API , and verifies resolved DOIs against metadata.
Discovers new papers from OpenAlex , arXiv, and bioRxiv matching a configurable research profile.
LaTeX is cleaned to plain text, split into overlapping chunks ( MATH 200 words, 50-word overlap), and encoded using sentence-transformers with the all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model (384 dimensions).
Semantic Scholar provides a citation graph and paper recommendations but does not operate at the intra-paper level (individual sentences and claims).
citation.js manages bibliography formatting but does not perform semantic analysis.

Undetected novelty. The author cannot easily tell which claims in their paper are genuinely new (req
Blind spots in coverage. The bibliography may be missing highly relevant work, or the abstract may f
Paperscope addresses these problems by embedding the paper and its literature into a shared vector s

Layer 1: Bibliography management ( bib/ ). Extracts citations from .tex and .bib files, resolves mis
Layer 2: Literature ingestion ( harvest/ , ingest/ ). Discovers new papers from OpenAlex , arXiv, an

The text/ module provides three shared utilities. clean\ latex() strips LaTeX commands, math environ

This ensures the tools run in any environment. The TF-IDF fallback produces lower-quality embeddings

In practice, alignment rates of 60–80\ are typical for well-cited papers. Contexts with low alignmen
Each claim extracted from the paper (bold assertions, numbered predictions) is embedded and compared
Two tools address reviewer preparation. Reviewer probes embed hypothetical reviewer questions and fi
For authors with multiple publications, self-overlap detects high-similarity passages between the cu
Argument flow tracks the paper's trajectory through embedding space paragraph by paragraph. Using PC
[Abstract alignment] embeds each section and the abstract, computing a coverage matrix. Sections wit
[Strength heatmap] computes per-paragraph scores for citation support (max similarity to any literat
[Journal targeting] fetches recent abstracts from candidate journals via OpenAlex, embeds them, and
[Revision diff] embeds two versions of a paper, matches sections by title similarity, and measures t
[Related radar] extracts keywords from the paper, searches OpenAlex, filters out papers already in t

Paperscope is implemented in Python (3.8+) with minimal dependencies: numpy for array operations, re
All 15 commands are accessible via a single CLI entry point:
python3 -m paperscope analyze paper.tex –literature text/ python3 -m paperscope abstract-check paper
Analysis commands produce both structured JSON output and human-readable console summaries. The JSON
External APIs (CrossRef, OpenAlex, Unpaywall) are used in their free tiers with polite rate limiting
